_note: ArtOps conversion tracker — log ACCEPT verdicts here after publish. Used by MonetizationReflectorAgent (03) for trend analysis and earned constraint generation.

_schema.id: string — unique entry ID, format: track-YYYY-MM-DD-NNN

_schema.loop_number: integer — which loop produced this ACCEPT
_schema.earned_constraint_generated: boolean — did this entry trigger a new earned constraint?
